debug_info.goal:
S : HarmonicOscillator
IC : ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions
x : Time → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 1)
⊢ S.EquationOfMotion x ∧
      x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC ∧
        Time.deriv x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC →
    x = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC

failed_attempts:
rintro ⟨hx, hx0, hv0⟩
  let y := IC.trajectory S
  have hy := trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC
  rw [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] at hx hy
  let z := x - y
  have hz_eqn (t : Time) : ∂ₜ (∂ₜ z) t = -S.ω^2 • z t := by
    simp only [z, Pi.sub_apply]
    rw [Time.deriv_sub, Time.deriv_sub]
    · simp [hx t, hy t]; module
    · sorry -- x smooth
    · sorry -- x' smooth
    · fun_prop
    · fun_prop
  let E (t : Time) : ℝ := ‖∂ₜ z t‖^2 + S.ω^2 * ‖z t‖^2
  have hE_deriv (t : Time) : ∂ₜ E t = 0 := by
    simp only [E]
    rw [Time.deriv_add, Time.deriv_mul_const]
    · sorry -- derivative calculation
    · sorry
    · sorry
  have hE_zero : E 0 = 0 := by
    simp [E, z, hx0, hv0]
    rw [trajectory_position_at_zero, trajectory_velocity_at_zero]
    simp
  have hz_zero (t : Time) : z t = 0 := by
    have hE_eq_zero : E t = 0 := sorry -- E constant
    have h_norm_sq_zero : ‖z t‖^2 = 0 := sorry -- E t = 0 implies z t = 0
    simp at h_norm_sq_zero
    exact norm_eq_zero.mp h_norm_sq_zero
  funext t
  rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← z]
  exact hz_zero t
